author: a-coban
body:
#### PR description:

This PR adds a new DQM validation module `NPSDQM` for the NPS physics category. 

It introduces the C++ 2 files (`DQM/Physics/src/NPSDQM.cc` and `DQM/Physics/src/NPSDQM.h`) and its default python configuration (`DQM/Physics/python/NPSDQM_cfi.py`). 

- **Expected output changes:** None.
- **Dependencies:** None.

#### PR validation:

- Basic local checks performed.
title: Added NPS DQM module
